meaning: 柔佛州[马来西亚马来亚地区州名]
examples: He came from a small town in Johore Malaysia.
Japanese heavy artillery was shelling downtown Singapore across the Johore Strait.
The city is connected with Singapore by a causeway across the narrow Johore Strait. Population, 249,880.
Instead of worrying about drugs, terrorists or illegal migrants, some well-placed Singaporeans see Johore as a base to expand its manufacturers and those of foreign firms.
